2_primaryJTBD.decision: Which tournaments should I register for based on my level and schedule?

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: GOOD - Strong decision focus for discovery tool
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: Yes - Filtering and selecting tournaments is clear primary action

4_visualHierarchy.heroElement: Tournament cards grid with upcoming events
4_visualHierarchy.assessment: EXCELLENT - Filter-first design with clear card grid

kpis.note: Shows result count for current filter

kpis.metric: Skill level match (via My Level filter)

5_kpiQuality.assessment: EXCELLENT - Strong actionable metrics for tournament selection

shouldBeInline: Quick registration CTA in details panel (if not already present)

8_stateCoverage.assessment: EXCELLENT - Comprehensive state handling with StateCard
gaps: No success state for saving tournament to calendar (if that feature exists)

9_roleScalability.recommendation: Well-designed for all levels - level-based filtering helps beginners

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Professional tournament discovery tool with excellent filtering UX
10_strategicVerdict.currentBehavior: Filter-driven tournament calendar with details panel
10_strategicVerdict.desiredBehavior: Filter-driven tournament calendar with registration integration

topIssues.issue: No registration integration visible (may need to verify details panel actions)
topIssues.impact: Player must leave app to register for tournaments

topIssues.issue: URL-persisted filters may confuse users if they share/bookmark URLs
topIssues.impact: Shared links may have unexpected filter state

topIssues.issue: No 'save to my calendar' or 'interested' functionality

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Add registration workflow + add 'save to calendar' action + consider reset button for URL filters

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses modular component architecture (CalendarHeader, QuickFilterTabs, SearchBar, etc.). URL-persisted state via useFilterState hook (advanced pattern). StateCard for loading/error (consistent).

stateHandling.empty: StateCard with 'Ingen turneringer funnet' message and search guidance
stateHandling.error: StateCard with error message and retry button

dataSource.note: Uses tournamentsAPI.getTournaments() for real tournament data

accessibility.keyboardNav: Good - uses button and input elements

advancedFeatures.urlPersistedFilters: useFilterState hook syncs filter state with URL query params

overallAssessment: EXCELLENT - Professional tournament discovery with strong filtering, needs registration integration
